allow: PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="Stock Pilot Port 3000" 2>$null)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="Next.js" 2>$null)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule dir=in protocol=TCP localport=3000)
PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Stock Pilot - Port 3000" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 3000 -Action Allow -Profile Any)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem .next -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "{0,-30} {1,10:N1} MB" -f $_.Name, $size })
